Title: Surgical Neurophysiologist
Company Location: 150 State Street, Albany, NY 12207, United States
Company Description:
Peak Neurophysiology Group is an Intraoperative Neurophysiological Monitoring (IONM) service provider based in Upstate New York, exercising a unique delivery model of clinical care. Unlike most other neuromonitoring groups, PNG neurophysiologists are trained in both the technical and interpretive components of IONM.
Our experience has taught us that the ability to effectively intervene during a surgical procedure is a direct function of the expertise of the neurophysiologist present in the operating room. PNG neurophysiologists have the skills and training required to evaluate the entirety of physiologic, anesthetic, surgical, and perioperative variables in a timely manner, with additional support available for consultation as needed.
Our unique professional model allows us to provide a quality of patient care that is unmatched by other IONM companies. At PNG, all of our clinicians hold postgraduate degrees in the health sciences and have received highly specialized training in intraoperative neurophysiology. Additionally, all PNG neurophysiologists that meet the eligibility requirements for Professional Board Certification by the ABNM are required to obtain this accreditation within two years of eligibility.

Title: Surgical Neurophysiologist
Company Location: 399 Knollwood Road, White Plains, NY 10603, United States
Company Description:
Neuro Alert speaks for patients when they cannot speak for themselves, ensuring safe and successful surgeries. A world-leading IONM provider, Neuro Alert blends technology with its values of collaboration, innovation and learning-based leadership to help build a healthier world.

Title: plastic surgeon
Company Location: 999 Franklin Avenue, Garden City, NY 11530, United States
Company Description:
New York Plastic Surgical Group, a division of Long Island Plastic Surgical Group, is the largest, longest- running plastic surgery group in the nation. Established in 1948, our practice has treated over half a million patients and developed many of the region's specialty centers including microsurgery, burn surgery, wound care, facial reanimation, peripheral nerve reconstruction, and cleft care. With 20+ doctors and 10+ locations, we are proud to provide patients with over 75 years of medical innovation. 
In addition to offering a full spectrum of plastic surgery and injectable services to our patients, we are also committed to supporting our community by meeting the need for reconstructive care. Each year our practice hosts an annual Breast Cancer Summit to provide an overview of the latest developments in breast cancer care and reconstruction. 
Beyond our work locally we are also proud to partner with ReSurge International to bring our expertise in limb reattachment, complex wound and burn management, reconstructive cleft lip and palate repair, and other life-altering surgeries to underserved communities worldwide. 
When it comes to aesthetics, our surgeons are proud to oversee Deep Blue Med Spa, a comprehensive medical spa designed to provide patients with non-surgical aesthetic options clinically proven to rejuvenate, restore, and refresh. From relaxing and results driven facials, to laser treatments and skin tightening, our highly skilled physician assistants, nurse practitioners, and medical aestheticians offer services customized to meet the needs of every patient. We also offer several medical grade skincare brands including our signature line: ProBLUEMD®.

Samaritan Medical Center (Watertown, New York) is a 294-bed not-for-profit community medical center, offering a full spectrum of inpatient and outpatient healthcare services. From primary and emergency care to highly specialized medical and surgical services, such as cancer treatment, neonatal intensive care, behavioral health and addiction services, and imaging services, Samaritan Medical Center and its team of healthcare professionals proudly serves the medical needs of our civilian and military community. Quality, compassion and safety are basic principles by which exceptional care is delivered at Samaritan.

In addition to the inpatient and outpatient services available at the main hospital and numerous community clinics and satellite testing centers, Samaritan is recognized as the leader in serving the community's long-term care needs. Samaritan Keep Home, a 272-bed long-term care facility, has established an exceptional reputation for caring for the senior population in northern New York. Expanding on its commitment to long-term care, SMC is finalizing construction on a brand new 288-bed long-term care and assisted living facility, which will open in early 2013.

Over 180 physicians in 40 different specialties work together with the 2,000+ employees at Samaritan Medical Center to offer a full spectrum of diagnostic and treatment services for people of all ages. We invite you to explore Samaritan's commitment to serving the healthcare needs of our civilian and military community, as well as our promise to you: to be here whenever and wherever you need us, and to do so with exceptional care and compassion that you and your family deserve.

Title: Neurosurgeon
Company Location: 43 Scotland Avenue, Albany, NY 12208, United States
Company Description:
Albany Medical Center, northeastern New York’s only academic medical center, is one of the Capital Region’s largest private employers with more than 9,000 employees. Albany Medical Center provides the highest level of patient care across disciplines, while receiving regional, national, and international recognition for high standards in patient care, education, and biomedical research.
The 766-bed Albany Medical Center offers access to the latest medical services and technological innovations and includes one of the busiest emergency rooms and trauma centers in New York, a children’s hospital and dedicated pediatric emergency room, intensive care units for adults and children, and organ transplant services. Albany Medical College graduates more than 200 medical doctors each year, as well as PAs, CRNAs, biomedical scientists, and bioethicists. Albany Medical College operates a biomedical research enterprise and the region’s largest physician practice with more than 500 doctors. 
Albany Medical Center, along with Albany Medical College, is a partner in the Albany Med Health System, the largest and only regionally governed, not-for-profit health system serving northeastern New York and western New England.

Title: Physician
Company Location: 1701 Mercy Health Place Suite 800, Cincinnati, OH 45237, United States
Company Description:
Mercy Health -- Youngstown (MHY) is the premier integrated health system in the Mahoning Valley of Ohio.  MHY is a Catholic, nonprofit health system providing nationally ranked care across the continuum from physician offices and ambulatory care sites, to hospital-based acute care, to home care, to long-term care, and to palliative medicine and hospice.  MHY is a region of Mercy Health, headquartered in Cincinnati, the largest integrated health system in Ohio.
MHY includes three Magnet-certified acute hospitals: 
1. St. Elizabeth Youngstown Hospital -- a 388 bed teaching hospital and regional referral center. St. E's includes the only Level I Trauma Center for a nine county catchment area and provides broad clinical leadership in Heart & Vascular care, Neurosurgery and Neurosciences, Oncology, Trauma, Critical Care, Orthopedics and Spine Surgery, Internal Medicine, Breast Care Center, Robotic Surgery, and Minimally Invasive Surgery.  St. E's is a Joint Commission accredited Stroke Center and Spine Center of Excellence, and the first Magnet Hospital for Nursing leadership in the state of Ohio.  St. E's is the only Joint Commission-accredited Sepsis Center of Excellence in Ohio.
2.  St. Joseph Warren Hospital -- a 160-bed teaching hospital that provides Level II Trauma services to the Trumbull County and surrounding areas.  Areas of excellence include general surgery, bariatric surgery, ob/gyn, pediatrics, oncology and emergency medicine.
3.  St. Elizabeth Boardman Hospital -- an almost 240-bed community hospital, named in 2010 to Thomson-Reuters Top 100 Hospitals, with expertise in general surgery, orthopedics, obstetrics, internal medicine and emergency medicine.  SEB is the home to the market's only Level III OB and Level III NICU (operated by Akron Children's Hospital).

See our website for full details on long term care, home care, hospice and more than 150 Mercy Health Physicians dedicated to provided superb quality and Amazing Patient Care!

Title: ATTENDING NEUROSURGEON
Company Location: 1175 Montauk Highway, West Islip, NY 11795, United States
Company Description:
Long Island Brain & Spine is a multidisciplinary spine and brain care center with a team of board-certified, highly skilled neurosurgeons and interventional pain management specialists. We have helped thousands of patients regain normal functioning and resume active lives. Our physicians employ state-of-the-art diagnostic and surgical techniques and treat each patient with personalized, confident care.
We specialize in treating arm, neck and back pain, spinal stenosis, carpal tunnel syndrome, degenerative disc disease, disc herniation, compression fracture and spinal, brain and pituitary tumors as well as epilepsy surgery and pediatric neurosurgery. Our approach is conservative, as we explore non-surgical options first, and perform surgery only when indicated.
Our physicians are highly trained in their fields, and have earned a reputation of professionalism and compassion in treating patients with complex and more common neurological conditions.
With privately owned Long Island locations, our board-certified neurosurgeons and interventional pain management physicians have successfully treated patients from across Long Island.

Title: Staff Attorney
Company Location: 574 Summit Avenue, Jersey City, NJ 07306, United States
Company Description:
Northeast New Jersey Legal Services’s (NNJLS) mission is to ensure equal access to justice for residents of Bergen, Hudson, and Passaic Counties, NJ experiencing poverty. No one should be denied a meaningful opportunity to have their day in court simply because they cannot afford a lawyer.  
NNJLS is a private non-profit public interest law firm that provides free legal representation in civil (non-criminal) matters to underserved individuals and families experiencing poverty. We also work to increase the public’s knowledge of their rights and responsibilities through community legal education.
NNJLS focuses on four core areas of civil law – housing, consumer, family, and public benefits. NNJLS also has specialized programs in place to address the civil legal needs of veterans, seniors, students, survivors of domestic violence, survivors of sexual assault, recent immigrants, persons living with HIV or AIDS, formerly incarcerated, the homeless, and residents experiencing poverty who have federal income tax issues with the IRS.

Title: Legal Secretary
Company Location: 600 Broad Street, Shrewsbury, NJ 07702, United States
Company Description:
In 2001, Charles Cerussi started Cerussi & Gunn, P.C., a boutique law firm dedicated to mastering the art and science of winning jury trials.  We proudly and exclusively represent victims in serious personal injury, medical malpractice and wrongful death cases.  

1.	We believe in our clients' cases, and if we don’t have passion for a client’s case, we will decline representation.  We only accept a small percentage of cases so we are able to bring strong commitment to each case we accept.
2.	Our client’s interests always come first.  We are committed to achieving the results to help our clients recover and move on with their lives after tragic events.
3.	The majority of our cases are referred by other attorneys, and the remainder by former clients.  We do not advertise in print, television, or on billboards.  
4.	The firm’s attorneys practice law with the highest degree of ethics and integrity.  We strive to always show respect for the clients that we are privileged to represent, our adversaries, and the Judges that we interact with on a regular basis.
5.	The firm does not practice in any other areas of law, we are civil trial specialists.
6.	We view our function as much more than just obtaining monetary compensation for our clients.  Many of our clients are clear that they are not litigious people, but either they or a loved one has been victimized and want to gain answers as to what happened and why.
 7.	We believe that by pursuing our clients’ individual cases, we achieve greater overall public safety.  This results in fewer victims and less lawsuits. 
 8.	We believe that there are cases that should not be pursued, and that it is the attorney’s responsibility to fully investigate a case to make sure that it has merit before filing a lawsuit.   This is particularly true in the area of medical malpractice, where we consult with highly credentialed medical experts to make sure that a case against a doctor or hospital has merit, before accepting a case.

Title: Attorney/Owner-Intellectual Property Law Firm
Company Location: 100 Market Street, Montvale, NJ 07645, United States
Company Description:
Trademarks, Service Marks & Branding
► We help you brand your product or service, through the selection of trademarks, protecting them and enforcing your branding rights. With decades of experience as a trademark and branding attorney, we can assist you in developing a brand image that has an impact and is suitable for your products and services. 
► Obtaining a trademark or service mark can be a relatively simple process providing you do your homework. 
► We assist you in searching, clearing and registering your trademarks. Typically, you select one or several marks that you believe you want to adopt; we do a search on one or all of your marks to determine which would be the best to use, e.g., free from interfering with other marks being used and free from legal issues, and advise you on branding issues. 
► We then file a trademark application covering the use of the selected mark on your goods or services that you plan to use the mark on or on which you are presently using the mark. 
► Generally, the application proceeds through the office with relatively few legal obstacles. However, once in a while there are issues, i.e. the trademark Examiner believes there are marks similar to yours, descriptiveness, etc., issues that we will provide guidance for overcoming. 
► Trademarks on the look of your product or its packaging can also be obtained, however this is a more complex process. 
► Costs in obtaining a trademark are generally reasonable and controllable. We also assist you in policing and enforcing your trademark rights and counseling you in transactions related to your trademarks, e.g., licensing, assignments, etc. 
 Patents: the process for obtaining them, policing them and enforcing your rights in patents is complex.
We also can assist you in policing and enforcing your patent rights and counseling you in transactions related to your trademarks, e.g., licensing, assignments, etc.

SAVING YOU MORE THAN MONEY

Our approach to divorce mediation focuses on the “person(s)” and not the problem. Our mediator is a licensed attorney and trained in therapeutic modalities, allowing her to address both the obvious and underlying issues during the mediation process in order to create long term solutions and agreements that remain in place even after the judgment of divorce.

A HOLISTIC PROCESS

A licensed attorney in New Jersey, New York and Maryland, Rachel Alexander has experience as a social worker and is trained in therapeutic modalities. These expertise and years of experience uniquely position Alexander Mediation to anticipate, identify and resolve underlying emotional issues in the mediation process to better resolve legal and financial matters.

GOAL ORIENTED APPROACH

Alexander Mediation utilizes a 5 phase mediation process that is tailored specifically to each party’s situation while remaining goal oriented to achieve amicable solutions as quickly and efficiently as possible.

LONG TERM SOLUTIONS

Alexander Mediation continues to offer clients support even after the judgment of divorce is finalized. Our free monthly support group is available to all who wish to join. Additionally, an appointed mediator remains accessible to our clients as a resource as they navigate the changes in circumstances throughout their lives.
